name: Felix Barry Moore
stanceSummary: Moore has publicly supported Israel's military response to Hamas, endorsed congressional resolutions backing Israel's right to self-defense, and supported supplemental Israel security assistance.

timeline.event: Moore said he stands with Israel and supported H.Res. 771 affirming Israel's right to defend itself against Hamas and Palestinian Islamic Jihad attacks.
Moore supported the Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act and said the U.S. should continue to supply Israel in wartime.
